zh.lifeSummary: 當Katarina Eckhart於1525年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 海爾布洛倫布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫時，她的父親Mathis Eckhart25歲，母親Eckhart24歲。她於1546年與David Maulik在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 海爾布洛倫布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1601年在她的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katarina Eckhart于1525年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 海爾布洛倫布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫时，她的父亲Mathis Eckhart25岁，母亲Eckhart24岁。她于1546年与David Maulik在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 海爾布洛倫布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1601年在她的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eckhart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements agi ‘point, edge (of a sword)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’.

variants.name: Eckardt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Arno, Gunther, Heinz, Lothar, Otto.

variants.name: Eckart
meanings: Americanized or Germanized form of Slovenian Ekart: from a personal name of ancient Germanic origin (see Eckhart ).

variants.name: Echard
meanings: French (Échard): unflattering nickname derived from the Old French adjective eschars ‘miserly, stingy’.

nameMeanings.name: Katarina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katarina Eckhart was born in 1525, in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Mathis Eckhart, was 25 and her mother, Eckhart, was 24. She married David Maulik in 1546, in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1601, in her hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katarina Eckhart est née en 1525, à Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Mathis Eckhart, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eckhart, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé David Maulik en 1546, à Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1601, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

Sie hat 1546 in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland David Maulik geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Katarina Eckhart è nata il nel 1525 nel Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Mathis Eckhart, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Eckhart, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato David Maulik nel 1546, nel Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1601, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Katarina Eckhart(이)가 1525년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 헤이브론 브라c켄하임 드u렌지머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mathis Eckhart(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eckhart(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1546년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 헤이브론 브라c켄하임 드u렌지머에서 David Maulik(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1601년 그녀의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katarina Eckhart nasceu em 1525, em Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Mathis Eckhart, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eckhart, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com David Maulik em 1546, em Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1601, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos.

ru.Dürrenzimmern, Landkreis Heilbronn, Bade: дuррензиммирн, браккеним, ландкрис хилбронн, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katarina Eckhart родилась в 1525 г. в местности дuррензиммирн, браккеним, ландкрис хилбронн, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Mathis Eckhart было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eckhart, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Maulik в 1546 г. в местности дuррензиммирн, браккеним, ландкрис хилбронн, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1601 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katarina Eckhart nació en 1525, en Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Mathis Eckhart, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eckhart, tenía 24 años. Se casó con David Maulik en 1546, en Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Landkreis Heilbronn, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1601, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
